title: The Ship that Sails in the Sky
overview: Norn lands to welcome a new female member, but the mysterious girl Kakeru finds doesn't remember her name. Despite this, she's warmly welcomed by the others aboard the ship.

title: Ability
overview: Norn is attacked by people seeking to capture and use members of the crew. When the enemy turns its weapons on the ship, Koharu releases her devastating ability to save them.

title: Sprouting Spring
overview: As the others try to make sense of the attack the day before, Koharu encounters a new boy aboard the ship. With the threat of an insider, who can truly be trusted?

title: Serenade of the Dawn
overview: Kakeru deploys a creative tactic to force Nanami and Akito to get along. Meanwhile, Mikoto and Sakuya patrol at ground level to search for the man who attacked the ship.

title: The Dozing Forest
overview: Seeing the girls out of sorts, Itsuki uses his ability to send them to a “dream world” with Koharu as Snow White, Mikoto as Cinderella, and Nanami is Red Riding Hood!

title: The Gears in Motion
overview: The entire crew is still reeling from the effects of last night's strange dream. Just as things couldn’t get more uncomfortable, the ship is attacked again… from the inside.

title: A Dream of Reality
overview: With the journey ending soon, the crew decides to have fun with a dare contest. However, wounded hearts and hidden intentions threaten the safety of everyone on the ship.

title: The World
overview: Mikoto’s been kidnapped, and Sakuya, Masaume, and the others launch a search. With war on the horizon, they are forced to learn the truth about their world’s dark history.

title: The Truth for Everyone
overview: With Koharu still missing, Kakeru returns to the surface to find her and his father. Meanwhile, Akito and Nanami prepare to reveal their secret to a member of the ship.

title: Aion The Eternity
overview: Everything changed when Koharu joined the crew of Norn. The sins of the past forge an uncertain future and put the fate of the crew, and the world itself, in the balance.

title: The Reset
overview: Following Sakuya’s vision of the near future, the crew hurries to rescue Koharu and Mikoto. On the island, Kakeru runs into Natsuhiko and Ron.

title: The New World
overview: The group is finally reunited aboard the ship. The Reset weighs heavily on their minds, and Koharu fears the inevitable global consequences of their decision.
